commands.review_summary:
Adds a `workboard_delete` agent tool, an `openclaw workboard delete <id>` CLI command, and focused deletion tests.

PR surface: Source +47, Tests +102. Total +149 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction: current source clearly confirms that agent and CLI deletion are absent, but this PR adds a new destructive capability rather than repairing defined behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The blocker is maintainer approval of the permanent-deletion and trust-boundary contract plus contributor-supplied real behavior proof, not a narrow mechanical repair.

target.title: feat(workboard): add workboard_delete tool and CLI command for card removal
target.body:
## Summary

Adds `workboard_delete` agent tool and `openclaw workboard delete` CLI command to permanently remove Workboard cards. Closes #92314.

**Problem:** The Workboard plugin has `WorkboardStore.delete()` and a gateway method `workboard.cards.delete`, but no agent-facing tool or CLI command. Agents cannot permanently remove cards.

**Changes:**
- **`tools.ts`**: Add `workboard_delete` tool with claim-scope authorization. Unclaimed cards can be deleted by any agent; claimed cards require the claim owner or a valid claim token.
- **`cli.ts`**: Add `openclaw workboard delete <id>` command with id-prefix resolution and `--json` output.
- **`tools.test.ts`**: Three new tests — delete unclaimed card with reference cleanup, claim-scope enforcement, and nonexistent-card error.

**Authorization model:** Follows the existing `canMutateCard` pattern used by `workboard_heartbeat`, `workboard_release`, etc. Hard-deletes the card row (with `ON DELETE CASCADE` on all child tables) plus cleans up KV-stored subscriptions, attachments, and cross-card link references via the existing `removeReferencesToCard` path.

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior:** Agents can permanently delete Workboard cards through the `workboard_delete` tool. Claimed cards require claim ownership. Cross-card references are cleaned up.

**Environment:** macOS 26.4.1, Node.js 24.x, pnpm, upstream `main` at d531c865.

**Steps:**
1. Branch from `upstream/main`, apply changes.
2. Run workboard test suite.

**Evidence after fix:**
```
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/workboard/src/tools.test.ts extensions/workboard/src/store.test.ts extensions/workboard/src/gateway.test.ts extensions/workboard/src/command.test.ts

 ✓  extensions/workboard/src/tools.test.ts (9 tests) 26ms
 ✓  extensions/workboard/src/store.test.ts (77 tests) 105ms
 ✓  extensions/workboard/src/gateway.test.ts (5 tests) 7ms
 ✓  extensions/workboard/src/command.test.ts (3 tests) 2ms

 Test Files  4 passed (4)
      Tests  94 passed (94)
```

**Observed result after fix:** All 94 existing + new tests pass. The `workboard_delete` tool correctly deletes unclaimed cards, enforces claim scope on claimed cards, throws for nonexistent cards, and cleans up parent-card link references.

**What was not tested:** End-to-end gateway dispatch, management UI delete button (not in scope).
target.author: liuhao1024
